summary: Iteration 18 - Frontend-only testing of multi-timeline display, audio conferences section, conference player, and document title color. ALL 4 FEATURES WORKING CORRECTLY.

issues: Still shows purple (rgb(139, 92, 246)) instead of green - only affects the MODULE 1 badge text, not the section headings which are correctly green

test_credentials: No login required for viewing Resources tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this iteration verified working: 1) Multi-timeline display shows 2 timelines (Cursus A, Cursus A Map), 2) Audio conferences section shows 1 conference by Jean-Baptiste Brenet, 3) Conference player at /conference/conf-averroes-brenet-module4 loads with full player controls, 4) Document headings in /context/Timeline_Module1_Traduction are green (#04D182).

multi_timeline_display.result: Shows 2 timelines: 'Cursus A' and 'Cursus A Map' under 'FRISE CHRONOLOGIQUE' section

audio_conferences_section.result: Shows 'CONFÉRENCES AUDIO' section with 1 conference: 'CONFÉRENCE : AVERROÈS, FAUTEUR DE TROUBLES, PAR JEAN-BAPTISTE BRENET' - Module 4 · 43 Mo

conference_player.result: Player loads with: title, MODULE 4 badge, CONFÉRENCE badge, speaker (Jean-Baptiste Brenet), description, waveform visualization, play/pause button, skip back 15s, skip forward 30s, speed control (1x), time display (0:00), file info (43 Mo, M4A)

document_title_color.result: Section headings display in GREEN color #04D182 (rgb(4, 209, 130))
